message:
feat(connector-host): add sandbox capability envelope and zone enforcement

Expand the connector host runtime with a sandbox capability system
that gates connector operations based on declared capability envelopes:

New types:
- ConnectorCapability enum: Invoke, ReadState, StreamEvents,
  FilesystemRead, FilesystemWrite, NetworkEgress, SecretBroker,
  ProcessExec
- ConnectorCapabilityEnvelope: declares allowed capabilities with
  target constraints (filesystem prefixes, network host allowlists,
  exec command allowlists)
- ConnectorSandboxZone: zone-scoped capability enforcement with
  decision history tracking
- ConnectorSandboxDecision: audit record for each authorization check
- ConnectorOperationRequest: structured operation authorization input

Key behaviors:
- Fail-closed: operations not in the capability envelope are denied
- Target-scoped: filesystem/network/exec capabilities require matching
  targets (path prefix, hostname, command name)
- Path traversal protection: normalize_absolute_path() resolves .. and
  . components before prefix checking
- Wildcard host matching: *.example.com patterns for network egress
- Decision history: bounded ring buffer of sandbox decisions for
  diagnostic snapshots

Integration tests cover the full sandbox fail-closed contract,
target-scoped allow/deny, and health snapshot reporting.

Proptest updated to include sandbox zone in config generation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
